services.name: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
services.description: Centralized identity service for managing users, user groups, and permissions for Huawei Cloud resources. Supports fine-grained permission policies, federated identity via SAML 2.0 and OIDC, agency-based cross-account delegation, and MFA enforcement. The IAM console provides a security scorecard with recommendations.

services.name: Host Security Service (HSS)
services.description: Server workload protection platform providing asset management, vulnerability scanning, baseline checking, intrusion detection, and ransomware prevention. Agent-based service that protects ECS instances, BMSs, and containers. Premium edition adds web tamper protection, application whitelisting, and file integrity monitoring.
keyFeatures: Intrusion detection (brute force, webshell, reverse shell)

services.name: Data Encryption Workshop (DEW)
services.description: Encryption key management service including KMS (Key Management Service), Dedicated HSM, and Key Pair Service. KMS provides managed encryption key creation, rotation, and usage. Dedicated HSM offers FIPS 140-2 Level 3 certified hardware security modules. Integrates with OBS, EVS, RDS, and other services for BYOK encryption.

services.name: Cloud Trace Service (CTS)
services.description: Audit logging service that records operations on Huawei Cloud resources. Captures management events (console, API, system) for 7 days by default. Tracker creation enables long-term export to OBS (Object Storage Service) for compliance and forensic analysis. Equivalent to AWS CloudTrail.
keyFeatures: Export to OBS for long-term storage

services.name: Cloud Firewall (CFW)
services.description: Cloud-native network firewall providing traffic control for internet-facing (north-south) and inter-VPC (east-west) traffic. Supports access control lists, intrusion prevention system (IPS), domain name filtering, and traffic analysis. Centralized policy management across multiple VPCs.

services.name: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
services.description: Protects web applications from common web attacks including SQL injection, XSS, command injection, and web shells. Supports OWASP Top 10 protection, bot management, CC attack protection, precise access control, and anti-crawler capabilities. Deployed as cloud WAF (CNAME) or dedicated WAF (in-VPC).

services.name: Anti-DDoS Service
services.description: Multi-tier DDoS protection service. Anti-DDoS provides free basic L3/L4 protection for all Huawei Cloud resources. Advanced Anti-DDoS provides dedicated scrubbing with higher mitigation capacity. CNAD (Cloud Native Anti-DDoS) provides enhanced protection without traffic diversion for reduced latency.

services.name: Database Security Service (DBSS)
services.description: Database audit and protection service that monitors database activity in real time. Captures all SQL operations for compliance auditing. Provides SQL injection detection, sensitive data access alerts, and risk behavior analysis. Supports RDS, GaussDB, DDS, and self-built databases on ECS.

services.name: Cloud Bastion Host (CBH)
services.description: Managed bastion host for centralized operations and maintenance access control. Provides a single entry point for SSH, RDP, and database access to cloud resources. All sessions are recorded for audit compliance. Supports multi-factor authentication, access approval workflows, and command filtering.

services.name: Situation Awareness (SA)
services.description: Security operations center platform providing unified threat detection, security posture assessment, and incident investigation. Aggregates security events from HSS, WAF, Anti-DDoS, CFW, and other security services. Provides threat intelligence integration, attack chain analysis, and compliance dashboards.

services.name: Virtual Private Cloud (VPC)
services.description: Isolated virtual network for Huawei Cloud resources with configurable IP addressing, subnets, route tables, and gateways. Security groups provide stateful instance-level access control. Network ACLs provide stateless subnet-level filtering. VPC flow logs enable network traffic analysis.

services.name: Log Tank Service (LTS)
services.description: Centralized log management service for collecting, storing, and analyzing logs from Huawei Cloud services and applications. Provides real-time log query, structured log analysis, alerting, and visualization dashboards. Integrates with CTS, ECS, ELB, VPC flow logs, and container services for comprehensive logging.
keyFeatures: Log transfer to OBS for archival
